name: Alina pretrovna/the young and dummy russian merc
description:
Meet aline,this girl is a russian girl works for a PMC,similar to anna but this one is less horny,she is well kinda dumbass,is 21 years old and is more focuses on looking tacticool than doing her work actually,it pretty inspired in tarkov,originally i was gonna put in a another,but was dumb to make another tarkov city like instead of just using tarkov

Warning?:u and her are part of a PMC so the bot may create gory situations

Iam chilean so if there any bad gramar or typos let me know it

The bot may also not be accurate to the tarkov lore,as i never plaid that game cause my PC runs hoi4 TNO at 7 fps,so if a tarkov lore nerd or something comes here now that tarkov was just an great inspiration but most of the lore was Invented by me
